summary: Plan 01 is additive, executable in the project environment, and aligned with current WebSettings, environment loading, doctor consumers, static gates, redaction policy, and the Wardline handoff.

review_basis.head: 9f425de3daa82890892a538ad37ed6cc1687095e
review_basis.baseline: Current WebSettings, generic ELSPETH_WEB__ loader, deployment consumers, and repository Python 3.13 environment.

resolved_findings.resolution: Every test command uses uv run pytest.
The contract now requires deployment_target=aws-ecs and pins default-fail/aws-ecs-pass behavior.
Database-scheme failures use static redacted detail with an adversarial credential-bearing test.
The embedded module snippet passes Ruff check and Ruff format-check.
The handoff includes Wardline explain/fix/rescan with no waiver for new findings.
Generic environment ingestion and model_fields_set provenance are directly tested.
The plan distinguishes settings-load failures from named post-construction ContractChecks.
CI-equivalent Ruff, format, and strict mypy gates are explicit.
Tests pin the exact ordered unique check-name sequence.
Dependencies name only actual Plan 01 consumers.

verification: third Python block piped to uv run ruff check --stdin-filename src/elspeth/web/deployment_contract.py -
third Python block piped to uv run ruff format --check --stdin-filename src/elspeth/web/deployment_contract.py -
all Plan 01 pytest commands are project-environment commands

review_history.summary: Initial review found five blockers and five warnings.
